# Enjab UI

The Enjab UI documentation has moved to the central Enjab developer docs, written for both
humans and coding agents. ui.enjab.ae now serves only the live showcase and the component
registry; it no longer hosts docs, the changelog, or update prompts.

- Docs: https://developers.enjab.ae/docs/enjab-ui
- Full index for agents (llms.txt): https://developers.enjab.ae/llms.txt
- Changelog: https://developers.enjab.ae/docs/changelog

This domain hosts the shadcn component registry. Install from here:

- Registry base: https://ui.enjab.ae/r/{name}.json
- Namespace: @enjab-ui
- Install the theme first, then any component:
    npx shadcn@latest add https://ui.enjab.ae/r/theme.json
    npx shadcn@latest add @enjab-ui/button

For setup, the component reference, the design rules, and how to update an existing project,
read https://developers.enjab.ae/llms.txt.
